title: No Magic for Socialists
original_title: မျက်လှည့်မုန်းတဲ့ခေတ်
overview: Artist Htoo Lwin Myo excavates the lesser-known and wildly joyful history of Myanmar’s horror and genre film industry in the 1950s that has persisted through political turmoil and archival neglect, told directly by the people who made it.
